notes.sg-remote-sensing-doppler-effect: This is a phenomenon, not a type of remote sensing.
notes.sg-remote-sensing-continuous-wave-radar: This is a specific type of radar, subsumed by bistatic radar in this context.
notes.sg-remote-sensing-radar-engineering-deta: Too general, likely covered by other radar topics.
notes.sg-remote-sensing-radar-imaging: This is a technique, not a specific sensor or application.
notes.sg-remote-sensing-wave-radar: Ambiguous, could refer to ocean waves or radar waves. Bistatic radar is more specific.
notes.sg-remote-sensing-global-positioning-sys: Label is too short, 'global positioning' is not specific enough.
notes.sg-remote-sensing-gnss-positioning-and-i: Label is too long and includes 'interference' which may not be the primary focus of remote sensing.
notes.sg-air-pollution-public-health: This is a duplicate of 'air quality health impacts'.
notes.sg-air-pollution-generalized-additive-mo: This is a statistical method, not a subtopic of air pollution.
notes.sg-air-pollution-confidence-interval: This is a statistical concept, not a subtopic of air pollution.
notes.sg-general-circulation-model-model-inter: This is a duplicate of 'model intercomparison'.
This is the canonical term for 'model intercomparison project'.
notes.sg-data-assimilation-ensemble-kalman-fil: ensemble kalman filter is a specific type of extended kalman filter, and the latter is more general and has higher support.
notes.sg-data-assimilation-extended-kalman-fil: ensemble kalman filter is a specific type of extended kalman filter, and the latter is more general and has higher support.
notes.sg-land-use-land-management: This is a sub-topic of land use, but 'land management' is too broad. 'Land use change' is more specific and relevant to meteorology.
notes.sg-land-use-thermal-infrared: This is a remote sensing technique, not a land use type. It is too general for this parent topic.
notes.sg-earth-system-earth-system-science: This is a very broad topic, but it is the canonical anchor for the parent topic. It is kept for this reason.
notes.sg-earth-system-earth-model-version: Added 'system' to clarify that this refers to earth system models, not just any earth model.
notes.sg-carbon-dioxide-carbon-cycle: This is a more specific version of the general 'carbon cycle' topic.
notes.sg-carbon-dioxide-atmospheric-carbon-cyc: This is a more specific version of the general 'carbon cycle' topic.
notes.sg-radiative-transfer-atmospheric-radiat: More specific to models rather than just 'code'
notes.sg-radiative-transfer-energy-budget: Clarify that it's the radiative component of the energy budget
notes.sg-radiative-transfer-international-sate: This is a specific project, not a general subtopic of radiative transfer.
